modules.name: hilal
build-commands: if [ -f branding/hilal/default16.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default16.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -f branding/hilal/default32.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default32.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -f branding/hilal/default48.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default48.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -f branding/hilal/default64.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default64.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -f branding/hilal/default128.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default128.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -f branding/hilal/default256.png ]; then install -m644 branding/hilal/default256.png /app/share/icons/hicolor/256x256/apps/org.gkdevstudio.Hilal.png; fi
if [ -d distribution ]; then cp -r distribution /app/lib/hilal/; fi
